scripts.quality:instructions: npm run validate:instruction-wiring && npm run validate:instruction-quality && npm run validate:instruction-budgets
scripts.quality:typecheck: npx tsc -p contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p copilot-ui/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p local-repo-mcp/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p local-tracker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p local-tracker/tsconfig.build.json --noEmit
scripts.quality:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path copilot-ui/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path copilot-ui/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.quality:test: npm run test:all && cargo test --manifest-path copilot-ui/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.quality:push: npm run quality:typecheck && npm run quality:rust && npm run quality:test
scripts.ci:local: node scripts/validate-ci-lockfiles.js && node scripts/generate-cli-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-policy-lockfiles.js && node scripts/validate-policy-lockfiles.js && node scripts/validate-manifest.js && node scripts/validate-doc-graph.js && node scripts/check-docs-dead-links.mjs && node scripts/validate-guidelines-wiring.mjs && node --test scripts/validate-instruction-quality.test.mjs scripts/desktop-release-acceptance.test.js copilot-ui/tests/codex-subagents-service.test.js && npm --prefix copilot-ui run ui:build && npm --prefix local-tracker run build && npm --prefix copilot-ui run tauri:check:linux && npm --prefix copilot-ui run validate:tauri-node-sidecar-layout && node copilot-ui/tests/ui-react-smoke.test.js && node copilot-ui/tests/runtime-startup-contract.test.js && node copilot-ui/lib/repoInventoryService.test.js
scripts.ci:local:full: npm run ci:local && npm --prefix copilot-ui run tauri:check && npm run docs:build
